requirement_topic.en: Swissgrid Interconnection and Market/Storage Participation Review
requirement_topic.zh: Swissgrid并网与储能项目参与审查
requirement_topic.zht: Swissgrid併網與儲能項目參與審查

summary.en: Switzerland usually requires project-level grid-connection coordination and market-path classification for BESS installations. Swissgrid and the local distribution operator usually review point of connection, capacity, protection logic, metering, protection settings, and control requirements before energisation.
summary.zh: 瑞士通常要求对BESS项目进行项目级并网协调和市场路径分类。Swissgrid和当地配电运营商通常在送电前审查并网点、容量、保护逻辑、计量、保护定值和控制要求。
summary.zht: 瑞士通常要求對BESS項目進行項目級併網協調和市場路徑分類。Swissgrid和當地配電營運商通常在送電前審查併網點、容量、保護邏輯、計量、保護定值和控制要求。

standards_or_laws: Swissgrid interconnection and technical connection conditions
ElCom Electricity Supply framework and connection rules where applicable
Utility interconnection review and acceptance documentation

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 36558-2023 and related utility interconnection procedures for electrochemical storage project planning and grid studies. These materials support technical comparison but cannot replace Swissgrid and Swiss local network-operator project approval.
summary.zh: 中国通常采用GB/T 36558-2023及相关电网企业程序进行锂电储能项目规划和并网研究。这些材料可用于技术比较，但不能替代Swissgrid及瑞士当地网运营商的项目批准。
summary.zht: 中國通常採用GB/T 36558-2023及相關電網企業程序進行鋰電儲能項目規劃和併網研究。這些材料可用於技術比較，但不能取代Swissgrid及瑞士當地網路營運商的項目批准。

standards_or_laws: China State Grid / China Southern Power Grid interconnection materials

gap.en: Exporters should confirm Swiss project categorisation (storage, controllability, curtailment, dispatch role), confirm local operator requirements, and align anti-islanding, over/under-voltage and frequency logic, protection selectivity, metering, remote-control, and commissioning evidence before site energisation.
gap.zh: 出口商应确认瑞士项目分类（储能、可控性、限发、调度角色）、当地运营商要求，并在送电前对齐防孤网、过欠压与欠压/过压逻辑、保护选择性、计量、远程控制和调试证据。
gap.zht: 出口商應確認瑞士項目分類（儲能、可控性、限發、調度角色）、當地營運商要求，並在送電前對齊防孤網、過欠壓與欠壓／過壓邏輯、保護選擇性、計量、遠端控制和調試證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected BESS in Swiss regulated projects where Swissgrid and local operator approvals apply.
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — China utility interconnection materials are not Swiss grid-approval proof.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Separate product conformity from project interconnection. Swissgrid and local operator path approvals are project-specific and should be completed with approved settings and commissioning records.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 将产品符合性与项目并网路径分开处理。Swissgrid和当地运营商批准具有项目特性，应完成通过的参数设置和投运记录。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 將產品符合性與項目併網路徑分開處理。Swissgrid和當地營運商批准具有項目特性，應完成通過的參數設定與投運記錄。
